articles.title: 3-year-old immigrant suffered alleged sexual abuse during months in federal custody, family says
articles.description:
“I just think that if they would have moved faster, nothing like that would have happened,” her father said.

The post 3-year-old immigrant suffered alleged sexual abuse during months in federal custody, family says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Family alleges a 3-year-old immigrant faced sexual abuse in federal custody for months.
The child's father claims faster action could have prevented the abuse.
This incident raises concerns about the safety of immigrant children in Boston's custody.

articles.title: US rescues aviator whose fighter jet was shot down in Iran
articles.description:
The fighter jet was the first American aircraft to have crashed in Iranian territory since the U.S. and Israel launched the war, striking Iran on Feb. 28.

The post US rescues aviator whose fighter jet was shot down in Iran appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: US military rescued an aviator after a fighter jet was shot down in Iran.
The incident marks the first American aircraft crash in Iran since February 28.
Boston residents may feel increased tensions and security concerns due to ongoing military actions.

articles.title: She’s running Boston with her best friend after both diagnosed with cancer
articles.description:
"Cancer tried to slow us down, but it messed with the wrong girls."

The post She’s running Boston with her best friend after both diagnosed with cancer appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Meg Gannon and her best friend are running the Boston Marathon together.
Both women were diagnosed with cancer but remain determined to participate.
Their story inspires Boston residents facing similar health challenges.
